prompt: Create a clean, square split-screen commercial image for athleisure clothing with polished ad photography and realistic typography. At the top across the full width, place a large bold all-caps white headline in a heavy sans-serif font: {argument name="headline text" default="BOUGHT FOR THE GYM. USED FOR THE COUCH."} The layout is divided vertically into 2 equal panels. In the left panel, show a neatly arranged flat lay of 5 apparel items on a smooth light gray studio background with soft directional lighting and subtle shadows: 1 black hoodie with drawstrings and a small white swoosh-style chest logo, 1 pair of black athletic shorts with a small white logo near the hem, 1 pair of white crew socks with black swoosh-style logos, and 1 pair of black running shoes with white midsoles and white swoosh-style side logos. The clothing should look premium, minimal, and carefully styled like an e-commerce campaign. In the right panel, show a young man wearing the same black hoodie, black shorts, white crew socks, and black running shoes, slouched lazily on a dark charcoal fabric couch in a dim cozy living room, holding a smartphone and looking relaxed and unmotivated. In front of him on a dark coffee table are 6 visible lounge items: 1 open pizza box with a pizza, 1 red soda can, 1 large red bag of nacho cheese tortilla chips, 1 TV remote, 1 blue bowl of chips, and 1 pink-frosted sprinkled donut partly visible at the bottom edge. Add a draped gray blanket on the couch and keep the mood humorous and relatable. At the bottom center, overlay a smaller white caption in a clean sans-serif font: {argument name="tagline text" default="Still worth it."} High-end product advertising aesthetic, crisp text rendering, brand-aware lifestyle marketing, realistic materials, balanced composition, subtle contrast between aspirational fitness purchase and actual couch use.
translatedPrompt: 制作一张简洁的正方形分屏运动休闲服饰商业图片，要求具备精致的广告摄影质感和逼真的排版。在顶部全宽处，放置一行醒目的粗体大写白色标题，使用厚重的无衬线字体：{argument name="headline text" default="BOUGHT FOR THE GYM. USED FOR THE COUCH."} 布局垂直分为 2 个等大的面板。左侧面板展示 5 件平铺的服装，背景为光滑的浅灰色摄影棚背景，配有柔和的定向光和细腻的阴影：1 件带抽绳的黑色连帽衫，胸前有白色小勾型标志；1 条黑色运动短裤，下摆附近有白色小标志；1 双白色中筒袜，带有黑色勾型标志；以及 1 双黑色跑鞋，配有白色中底和白色勾型侧标。服装应看起来高端、简约，并像电商广告大片一样经过精心设计。右侧面板展示一名年轻男子，身穿同样的黑色连帽衫、黑色短裤、白色中筒袜和黑色跑鞋，懒散地瘫坐在昏暗舒适客厅里的深炭灰色布艺沙发上，手里拿着智能手机，神情放松且毫无干劲。他面前的深色咖啡桌上摆放着 6 件可见的休闲物品：1 个打开的披萨盒，里面装着披萨；1 罐红色汽水；1 大袋红色玉米片；1 个电视遥控器；1 个蓝色薯片碗；以及底部边缘隐约可见的 1 个粉色糖霜撒糖甜甜圈。在沙发上加一条垂下的灰色毯子，保持幽默且具共鸣的氛围。在底部中心，叠加一行较小的白色说明文字，使用简洁的无衬线字体：{argument name="tagline text" default="Still worth it."} 高端产品广告美学，清晰的文字渲染，具备品牌意识的生活方式营销，逼真的材质，平衡的构图，展现出健身消费愿望与实际沙发瘫坐之间的微妙反差。

breakdown.creativeCore: 分屏运动休闲风沙发广告：一张精致的正方形产品广告，展示运动服既是健身装备也是舒适的居家服饰，非常适合电商或品牌生活方式营销。
breakdown.subject: 产品
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
